message:
Initial implementation of session-memory Claude Code plugin

MCP server (stdio, TypeScript) with 7 tools for logging decisions and
tracking investigations across sessions. Decisions persist at project
level, investigations are session-scoped and bundle failed approaches
with the final resolution.

Hooks:
- PreCompact: injects concise session state into compacted context
- SessionStart: nudges about existing project decision history

35 tests covering integration, hooks, edge cases, and end-to-end
workflows including cross-session persistence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+    "email": "eng@primeradiant.ai"

+  "license": "UNLICENSED"
+}

+node_modules/

+#!/usr/bin/env bash
